question: Is the red sedan from Image 1 completely replaced by the black Range Rover SUV from Image 2?
Does the inserted SUV retain the recognizable identity features (grille, headlights, body shape) of the Range Rover from Image 2?
Is the SUV aligned with the road's curvature and perspective, pointing into the turn correctly?
Does the scale of the SUV appear realistic relative to the lane width and guardrails?
Does the SUV body exhibit moderate motion blur consistent with the tracking shot style of Image 1?
Do the SUV's tires show rotational blur, eliminating the static and crisp appearance of the donor image?
Is there visible dust added near the rear wheels of the SUV?
Does the added dust match the color of the road surface and the texture style of Image 3?
Have the parking lot reflections (e.g., white ground lines, other cars) been removed from the SUV's windows and paint?
Do the new reflections on the SUV match the mountain road environment (sky, mountains, guardrails)?
Does the lighting direction and color temperature on the SUV match the warm sunlight of Image 1?
Does the SUV cast a realistic contact shadow on the road, preventing it from appearing to float?
Are the contrast and film grain of the inserted SUV consistent with the overall aesthetic of Image 1?
Are the edges of the SUV blended smoothly into the scene without visible halos or jagged cutouts?
Are the background mountains and guardrails preserved without distortion or warping?
Is the image free from visual artifacts like ghosting, smudging, or remnants of the original red sedan?
